screenshot.caption: Configure your KeyForge devices, macros and workflows from one app.
Assign shortcuts, layers, and actions to every key and knob.
Combine shortcuts, text, and delay blocks into custom action sequences.
Create and manage multiple custom configurations for your device.
Fast, focused, and designed around productivity.

description.p: KeyForge Master configurator is a intuitive software that lets you create custom actions and configurations, turning your KeyForge device into a tailored productivity powerhouse.

ul.li: Intuitive: Easy to use, clean design. Customize your device in no time.
Versatile: Multiple predefined actions to choose from. Also you can create multiple configurations for every use case.
Complex: You can also create your own custom actions/macros using our drag and drop builder.

description.p: You can create multiple configurations for fun and work in the Settings panel. Switch the active configuration by pressing the Super Key on your device or using the Settings panel. You can create custom actions/macros using Actions Forge, our intuitive solution for creating macros, developed to boost your productivity.

ul.li: New custom action builder - Combine blocks like shotrcuts, text, delays and more to create complex workflows.
Rebuilt the device communication protocol to work with the KeyForge Firmware 2.0
